info.name: 01 - User Common (Part 1: Profile + Tasks + SubTasks) - CORRECTED
info.description:
Common user endpoints: User Profile, Tasks, and SubTasks

**⚠️ IMPORTANT**: This collection has been CORRECTED to match actual backend implementation in task.module

**Backend Routes Reference**:
- Task Routes: src/modules/task.module/task/task.route.ts
- SubTask Routes: src/modules/task.module/subTask/subTask.route.ts

**Authentication Required**: Yes
**Header**: Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}

**Rate Limits**:
- User endpoints: 30 requests / minute
- Task creation: 30 / hour (5/day max for personal)
- SubTask endpoints: 30 / minute

**Base URL**: {{baseUrl}}/v1

**Last Updated**: 16-03-26
**Version**: 4.0 - Corrected to match backend implementation

request.description: Get current user profile with statistics

Get daily task progress for dashboard display

**Response**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "date": "2026-03-16",
    "totalTasks": 5,
    "completedTasks": 2,
    "pendingTasks": 3,
    "inProgressTasks": 0,
    "progressPercentage": 40,
    "tasks": [...]
  }
}
```

Get filtered task list

**Filters**:
- status: pending|inProgress|completed
- taskType: personal|singleAssignment|collaborative
- priority: low|medium|high
- from: Start date (ISO)
- to: End date (ISO)
- sortBy: Field to sort (- for desc)

Get single task details with populated user details

**Response**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "_id": "task123",
    "title": "Math Homework",
    "status": "pending",
    "priority": "high",
    "taskType": "personal",
    "scheduledTime": "10:30 AM",
    "createdById": {...},
    "ownerUserId": {...}
  }
}
```

Create a new task

**Task Types**:
- personal: For yourself only
- singleAssignment: Assign to one person
- collaborative: Assign to multiple people

**Permission Required**:
- Business users: Always allowed
- Child users: Must be Secondary User

**Rate Limit**: 30 requests/hour
**Daily Limit**: Max 5 personal tasks per day

Update task details

**Access**: Only task creator or owner can update

Update task status

**Valid Statuses**:
- pending
- inProgress
- completed

**Valid Transitions**:
- pending → inProgress → completed
- pending → completed (direct)
- inProgress → pending (pause)

**Note**: Completed tasks cannot change status

Update all subtasks at once (embedded subtasks in Task model)

**Auto-Updates**:
- totalSubtasks count
- completedSubtasks count
- completionPercentage
- status (auto-completed if all done)
- completedTime (auto-set if all done)

Soft delete task (sets isDeleted: true)

**Access**: Only task creator or owner

query.description: Optional: Get suggestion for assignee (parent creating for child)

request.description:
Get AI-powered time suggestion for task scheduling

**Response**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "suggestedTime": "09:00",
    "suggestedTime12Hour": "09:00 AM",
    "basedOn": "your_preferred_time",
    "confidence": "high",
    "explanation": "Based on your task history, you usually start tasks at 09:00 AM.",
    "alternativeTimes": ["08:00", "09:00", "10:00"]
  }
}
```

**Use Cases**:
1. Creating task → Get suggested time
2. Parent creating for child → Pass assignedUserId
3. Scheduling optimization → Use suggestion

🎯 PARENT DASHBOARD - Get all children's tasks with status filtering

**Figma**: teacher-parent-dashboard/dashboard/dashboard-flow-01.png

**Use Case**: Parent dashboard showing all children's tasks filtered by status tabs:
- All (6) | Not Started (1) | In Progress (2) | Completed (2) | Personal Task (0)

**Query Parameters**:
- `status`: Filter by status (default: 'all')
  - 'all' - Show all statuses
  - 'pending' - Not Started tasks
  - 'inProgress' - In Progress tasks
  - 'completed' - Completed tasks
- `taskType`: Filter by task ownership (default: 'children')
  - 'children' - Show children's tasks
  - 'personal' - Show parent's personal tasks
- `page`: Page number for pagination
- `limit`: Items per page
- `sortBy`: Sort field (prefix with - for descending)

**Response**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "tasks": [
      {
        "_id": "task001",
        "title": "Complete Math Homework",
        "description": "Finish exercises 1-10",
        "status": "pending",
        "priority": "high",
        "taskType": "singleAssignment",
        "scheduledTime": "08:30 AM",
        "startTime": "2026-12-10T08:30:00.000Z",
        "dueDate": "2026-12-10T23:59:59.000Z",
        "totalSubtasks": 3,
        "completedSubtasks": 0,
        "completionPercentage": 0,
        "subtasks": [
          {
            "_id": "sub001",
            "title": "Call with design team",
            "isCompleted": false,
            "order": 1
          }
        ],
        "assignedTo": {
          "_id": "child001",
          "name": "Alex Morgan",
          "email": "alex@example.com",
          "profileImage": "https://..."
        },
        "createdById": {...},
        "assignedUserIds": [...]
      }
    ],
    "pagination": {
      "page": 1,
      "limit": 20,
      "total": 6,
      "totalPages": 1
    },
    "filters": {
      "status": "all",
      "taskType": "children"
    }
  },
  "message": "Children tasks retrieved successfully for dashboard"
}
```

**Frontend Usage**:
```javascript
// Get all children's tasks
const { data } = await api.get('/tasks/dashboard/children-tasks?status=all');

// Filter by Not Started
const pendingTasks = await api.get('/tasks/dashboard/children-tasks?status=pending');

// Show parent's personal tasks
const personalTasks = await api.get('/tasks/dashboard/children-tasks?taskType=personal');
```

**Authorization**: Business role (Parent/Teacher) only

✅ CORRECTED - Create a new subtask

**Backend Route**: POST /v1/tasks/subtask/

**Note**: taskId must be in request body (not URL path)

**Auto-Updates Parent Task**:
- totalSubtasks count
- completionPercentage recalculation

item.name: Get All Subtasks by Task ID

request.description:
✅ NEW - Get subtask completion statistics for logged-in user

**Backend Route**: GET /v1/tasks/subtask/statistics

**Response**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "total": 50,
    "completed": 30,
    "pending": 20,
    "completionPercentage": 60
  }
}
```

✅ NEW - Get single subtask details

**Backend Route**: GET /v1/tasks/subtask/:id

**Use Case**: Edit subtask view

**Response**:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "_subTaskId": "sub123",
    "title": "Math Problem 1",
    "isCompleted": false,
    "order": 1,
    "createdById": {...},
    "assignedToUserId": {...}
  }
}
```

✅ NEW - Update subtask details

**Backend Route**: PUT /v1/tasks/subtask/:id

**Auto-Updates Parent Task**: Recalculates completion percentage

✅ CORRECTED - Toggle subtask completion status

**Backend Route**: PUT /v1/tasks/subtask/:id/toggle-status

**Auto-Updates Parent Task**:
- Updates completedSubtasks count
- Recalculates completionPercentage
- Auto-completes parent task if all subtasks done

**Note**: isCompleted field is required in body

✅ NEW - Delete a subtask

**Backend Route**: DELETE /v1/tasks/subtask/:id

**Auto-Updates Parent Task**:
- Decrements totalSubtasks count
- Recalculates completionPercentage
